/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/jam.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libjam.so.1 -o libjam.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/jam.dir/src/jam.c.o CMakeFiles/jam.dir/src/jam_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/jam.dir/src/jam_kernels_generic.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_sse3.dir/src/jam_kernels_sse3.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avx2.dir/src/jam_kernels_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avx2.dir/src/jam_kernels_kquant_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avx2.dir/src/jam_kernels_nvfp4_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avxvnni.dir/src/jam_kernels_avxvnni.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avx512bw.dir/src/jam_kernels_avx512bw.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_avx512.dir/src/jam_kernels_avx512.c.o CMakeFiles/jam_q4k.dir/src/jam_kernels_q4k_avx512.c.o  -lm
